description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in phpRaid 3.0.4 and 3.0.5 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a URL in the phpraid_dir parameter to (1) configuration.php, (3) guilds.php, (4) index.php, (5) locations.php, (6) login.php, (7) lua_output.php, (8) permissions.php, (9) profile.php, (10) raids.php, (11) register.php, (12) roster.php, and (13) view.php.
